meaning: n.钻孔机,钻子,播种机,军事训练,操练,(反复)练习,条播机v.训练,钻孔,条播
examples: The drill has variable speed control.
This is not a fire drill—it's for real.
A plug had been inserted in the drill hole.
The drill also went through a coal seam at 660m that nobody knew existed.
The image was taken after the sample was transferred from the drill to the rover's scoop.
